chapter_title.en: The Reward of Voluntary Prayers During the Time of Heedlessness

text: 1559 - قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «تَنَفَّلُوا فِي سَاعَةِ اَلْغَفْلَةِ وَ لَوْ بِرَكْعَتَيْنِ خَفِيفَتَيْنِ فَإِنَّهُمَا تُورِثَانِ دَارَ اَلْكَرَامَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1559 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Perform supererogatory (extra) prayers during the time of heedlessness, even if it is just two light rak'ahs (units of prayer), for they lead to the abode of honor."
